title: justicia candelariae
intro: Justicia candelariae, also known as the Candlestick plant or Candelaria Justicia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Justicia candelariae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
